meaning: under (guidance, supervision, rules, the law, etc.)

data.romaji: shita no toi ni kotae nasai .
ii tenki ni naru you ni o negai suru ningyou wo ( teru teru bouzu ) to yon de ,
data.translation: The dolls that pray for nice weather are called ``Teruterubouzu''.

data.romaji: gakkou no ensoku ya undou kai no mae no nichi ni ① kore wo tsukuri masu .
data.translation: ①Make this the day before a school field trip or sports day.

data.romaji: kodomo tachi ha ie no nin ni ② tetsudatsu te moratsu te ,
data.translation: The children ask their family members to help them,
Made from white cloth or paper,

meaning: under (guidance, supervision, rules, the law, etc.)

data.romaji: ie no yane no shita ni tsurushi te ( ※ 1 ) ③ inori masu .
data.translation: Hang it under the roof of your house (*1)③ and pray.

data.romaji: himo nado de musun de ue kara sageru koto
data.translation: Tie it with a string and hang it from above

data.romajiQues: ton 1 ① kore no imi ha dore ka .
data.translationQues: Question 1 ①What is the meaning of this?

meaning: indicates the subject of a sentence

data.romajiQues: ton 2 ② tetsudatsu te moratsu te to aru ga , ( tetsudatsu te morau ) no ha dare ka .
data.translationQues: Question 2 ② It says that you will be asked to help, but who will be the one to "help"?

meaning: indicates the subject of a sentence

data.romajiQues: ton 3 ③ inori masu to aru ga , ( inoru ) no ha dare ka .
data.translationQues: Question 3 ③ It says that we pray, but who is the one who “prays”?
